titleStmt.title: SII 29.84: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 84. (A.R. No. B. 190 of 1962-63.) MADDŪRU, ALAMPUR TALUK, MAHABUBNAGAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the slab in the ruined fort.

The top portion of the slab is broken and lost. It refers to Tribhuvanamalladēva, his subordinate Ayya and mahāpradhāna daṇḍanāyaka Śrī Rudra-bhattōpādhyāya who was governing Ayije 300 division along with other territories. Perhaps the record registered a grant. It is in characters of 11th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiya ©
nadhāraṇa maunānuṣṭhāna japasamāLetter ra is written below the line.
dhiśīla guṇasaṁpannarvvidha gudha (vidagdha ?) vidvajjana
pārijāta ṣaṭtarkka kumudinī vika
sana sudhā daudhitimimāṁ sāmā
nasa sarōvara rājahaṁsa ssakala sa
dācāra paricālanaika rasikarvvaṁ
du jintāmaṇi samāś®ta jana
kaḻpa vṛkṣarnnāmādi sama
sta prasasti sahitaṁ śrīma
tṛbhuvanamalladēvarārādhya
rappa śrīmadayyaṁgaḷma
hāpradhānaṁ daṇḍanāya
kaṁ śrīrudrabhaṭṭō
pādhyāyaru Ayije
mūnūṟuvaṁ palavuṁ
sarvvanamaśyaṁ kuttuṁStops here abruptly.
Digital edition of SII 29.84 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
